docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY FORTE-HALEY ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT TANG VINCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
CERT MAIL TO VINCE LANG/LISA TSANG GOLDEN FIELD REALTY RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORTE-HALEY ALICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TANG VINCE $493.74 PRINCIPAL, $5.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $498.74, PLFT REC'D $54.24 CLOCK; $50 BED SPREAD, $250 SERV CLEANING, $19.50 SOFA CLEANING PRODUCT $120 MEALS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-20-1994, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO OCT-04-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
